title: zigadenus muscitoxicum
intro: Zigadenus muscitoxicum, also known as death camas, is a perennial plant that belongs to the lily family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of toxic compounds such as muscitotoxin, which has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits. Some of the reported health benefits of death camas include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, although its use is not without risks due to its toxicity. In herbal preparations, death camas has been used in small amounts in some remedies, often in combination with other plants, but caution is advised due to its toxicity.
